title: Parish school boards' authority to budget amount necessary for payment of benefits
doc_html:
§901.38.  Parish school boards' authority to budget amount necessary for payment of benefits

Parish school boards are authorized to make adequate provision in their budgets to pay the benefits authorized by this Part.

Redesignated from R.S. 17:764 pursuant to R.S. 24:253.
doc_text:
§901.38.  Parish school boards' authority to budget amount necessary for payment of benefits
Parish school boards are authorized to make adequate provision in their budgets to pay the benefits authorized by this Part.
Redesignated from R.S. 17:764 pursuant to R.S. 24:253.
